h3: Canada welcomes the FIFA World Cup 2026TM

sections.heading: Most requested
bullets: Visit the Canadian Virtual War Memorial
Major events in Canada’s Capital Region

sections.heading: Funding - Culture, history and sport
items: View a list of Government of Canada funding opportunities related to culture, history and sport.

sections.heading: Events, celebrations and commemorations
items: Participate in our national events and celebrations and join us in commemorating people and chapters from Canadian history.

sections.heading: Cultural landmarks and attractions
items: Experience nature in one of Canada's national parks, discover cultural traditions at a historic site, or visit national treasures in Canada's Capital region.

sections.heading: Canadian identity and society
items: Get a better understanding and appreciation of the events, experiences, people and emblems that reflect and have shaped Canada's history and identity.

sections.heading: Sport
items: Learn how our sport programs provide Canadians with access to sport as part of a healthy and active lifestyle, and help athletes participate and succeed in competitions.

sections.heading: History and heritage
items: Discover the institutions that help preserve Canada's history and heritage and make the collections and resources accessible to the Canadian public and professionals.

sections.heading: Arts and media
items: Explore funding opportunities, and information and services available in the arts and media industries, including festivals, music, book publishing, film and more.

sections.heading: Youth leadership and cultural programs
items: Enjoy learning and adventure, friendship and discovery as you take part in student or graduate jobs, leadership initiatives, internships, park activities and language immersion programs.

sections.heading: Cultural trade and investment
items: Discover the programs, policies and regulations in place to support the acquisition or preservation of cultural objects and media industries for the long-term benefit of Canadians.

sections.heading: Canada welcomes the FIFA World Cup 2026TM
items: Make the most of the event and discover the best of Canada. Consult the resources for fans, travellers and businesses.

sections.heading: Your Canadian summer starts here
items: Free or discounted museums, parks, campsites and trains from June 19 to September 7. Plan your adventure now.

sections.heading: Canadian Sport Policy 2025-2035
items: The Policy sets the direction on the future of sport in Canada for governments and partners.
